title: Christopher Lambert
content: Christophe Guy Denis Lambert (;; born 29 March 1957), known professionally as Christopher Lambert, is an American-French actor, novelist, and producer. He started his career playing supporting parts in several French films, and became internationally famous with the role of Tarzan in ""in 1984. For his performance in the 1985 film "Subway", Lambert received the César Award for Best Actor. His best-known role is Connor MacLeod in the 1986 cult adventure-fantasy film "Highlander" and the subsequent film franchise series of the same name.
